\tzpentry{ID3566}{Concept Units Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3566 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \zeta \;=\; \nabla^2_{\!s}\Psi \;=\; \frac{1}{R^2}\Bigg[\frac{1}{\sin\theta}\frac{\partial}{\partial\theta}\Big(\sin\theta\frac{\partial\Psi}{\partial\theta}\Big) +\frac{1}{\sin^2\theta}\frac{\partial^2\Psi}{\partial\lambda^2}\Bigg]. \]
